label: Sovereign State
description: A state with its own institutions and populations that has a permanent population, territory, and government.

label: Dependent Territory
description: A territory that does not possess full political independence or sovereignty as a separate state.

label: Disputed Territory
description: A territory whose sovereignty is subject to a dispute between two or more states.

label: Administrative Area
description: A geographic area defined for administrative purposes (e.g., Antarctica).
